# IPTV UPG — Full Reference for AI Ingestion
> Last updated: 2026-05-14

> IPTV UPG (https://www.iptvupg.com) is an independent IPTV streaming service operating since 2019. The service delivers 24,000+ live TV channels and 120,000+ on-demand titles in HD and 4K/UHD via the M3U/Xtream Codes protocol. Plans range from $16/month to $90/year ($7.50/month). A free 24-hour trial is available via WhatsApp without a credit card.

> Companion file: https://www.iptvupg.com/llms.txt (concise summary)

## What is IPTV?

IPTV (Internet Protocol Television) is a digital television delivery method that streams live channels and on-demand video over an IP network (the public internet or a private managed network) instead of via terrestrial broadcast, satellite, or coaxial cable. Major broadcasters that operate IPTV services include BT (United Kingdom), AT&T U-verse (United States), Verizon Fios (United States), and Telia (Nordics). IPTV is defined by the ITU-T as the delivery of multimedia services such as television/video/audio/text/graphics over IP-based networks with the required level of quality of service and experience, security, interactivity, and reliability.

### How IPTV Streams Reach Your Screen

1. **Encoding.** Live channels and VOD assets are encoded into H.264 (AVC) or H.265 (HEVC) at multiple bitrates so the system can serve every viewer's bandwidth profile.
2. **CDN distribution.** Encoded segments are pushed to edge servers close to subscribers, minimising latency and packet loss.
3. **Authentication.** When a subscriber opens an IPTV player and signs in, their credentials (M3U URL, username, password, or Xtream Codes API) are validated against the provider's subscriber database.
4. **Delivery protocol.** Live channels are typically delivered over HLS (HTTP Live Streaming, Apple) or MPEG-DASH (Dynamic Adaptive Streaming over HTTP). Both are adaptive-bitrate protocols that adjust quality to network conditions in real time.
5. **Playback.** The IPTV player decodes the stream and renders it. Modern players also surface the EPG (Electronic Program Guide), category filters, search, and recording.

### Protocols & Formats

- **M3U / M3U8.** Plain-text playlist format that lists channel URLs. The de facto IPTV interchange format.
- **Xtream Codes API.** A JSON-based API used by most modern IPTV control panels. Standardised endpoints expose channels, VOD, series, and EPG.
- **HLS (HTTP Live Streaming).** Apple-originated, segmented streaming. The most universal IPTV transport on consumer devices.
- **MPEG-DASH.** Open standard for adaptive streaming. Common alongside HLS in production CDNs.

## IPTV UPG — Service Facts

- **Live Channels:** 24,000+ from 190+ countries (sports, entertainment, news, kids, international).
- **VOD Library:** 120,000+ movies and series, refreshed regularly.
- **Video Quality:** SD, HD (1080p), and 4K/UHD. Adaptive bitrate avoids freeze-then-buffer behaviour common with single-bitrate providers.
- **Server Uptime:** 99.9% measured by an independent monitoring stack (12-month rolling average).
- **Channel Start Time:** Median 1.8 seconds from click to picture, measured across all live channels.
- **Simultaneous Connections:** 2 devices per subscription. Unlimited registered devices; only concurrent streams are capped.
- **EPG:** Full Electronic Program Guide with 7-day forward listings.
- **Activation:** Instant — credentials delivered within 60 seconds of payment confirmation.
- **Free Trial:** 24 hours, no credit card. Requested via WhatsApp.
- **Refund Policy:** 7-day money-back guarantee on every paid plan.
- **Payment Methods:** Visa, Mastercard, cryptocurrency.
- **Languages Supported:** English, Romanian.
- **Support:** 24/7 via WhatsApp and email. Median WhatsApp response under 5 minutes.
- **Operating Since:** 2019.
- **Registered Address:** 41 Midhurst Ave, Muswell Hill, London N10 3HR, United Kingdom.

## Pricing (USD)

| Plan | Total Price | Effective Monthly | Savings vs. Monthly |

| 1 Month | $16 | $16.00 | — |
| 3 Months | $39 | $13.00 | 19% |
| 6 Months | $60 | $10.00 | 38% |
| 12 Months | $90 | $7.50 | 53% |

Every plan unlocks the same library and features. There are no feature tiers, no auto-renewal, and no surprise charges. The annual plan is the best value at 53% off the monthly rate. Purchase URL: https://www.iptvupg.com/iptv-subscription

## Compatible Devices

IPTV UPG works on every major streaming platform with no proprietary hardware required.

- **Smart TVs:** Samsung (Tizen, 2017+), LG (webOS, 2014+), Sony.
- **Streaming Sticks:** Amazon Fire TV Stick (4K, 4K Max, Cube, Lite), Roku (Express, Streaming Stick, Ultra).
- **Set-Top Boxes:** MAG (254, 322, 420, 424, 524), Formuler, Android TV boxes.
- **Premium Streaming Boxes:** Apple TV HD, Apple TV 4K.
- **Mobile:** Android phones and tablets, iPhone, iPad.
- **Computers:** Windows PC, macOS.

Setup guides:
- macOS: https://www.iptvupg.com/macos-iptv
- Android: https://www.iptvupg.com/android-iptv
- Roku: https://www.iptvupg.com/roku-iptv
- Samsung TV: https://www.iptvupg.com/samsung-tv-iptv
- LG TV: https://www.iptvupg.com/lg-tv-iptv
- Amazon Fire TV: https://www.iptvupg.com/fire-tv-iptv
- MAG Box: https://www.iptvupg.com/mag-iptv
- Apple TV: https://www.iptvupg.com/apple-tv-iptv

## Recommended IPTV Players

| Player | Best For | Where |
|--------|---------|-------|
| IPTV Smarters Pro | All-round, beginner-friendly | Google Play, App Store |
| TiviMate | Android TV / Fire TV power users | Google Play |
| GSE Smart IPTV | iPhone, iPad, macOS | App Store |
| VLC Media Player | Manual M3U test on PC / Mac | videolan.org |
| Perfect Player | MAG-style interface | Google Play |

## Internet Speed Requirements

- 5 Mbps — SD streaming
- 10 Mbps — HD (1080p)
- 25 Mbps — true 4K / UHD
- 50 Mbps+ — two simultaneous 4K streams comfortably

Wired Ethernet is the most stable for 4K. Modern Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac) and Wi-Fi 6 also work well. Adaptive bitrate streaming automatically downgrades quality during brief congestion and restores full resolution within seconds.

## IPTV Free Trial — 24 Hours, No Credit Card

The IPTV UPG free trial is 24 hours of unrestricted access to the full paid-tier catalog: every channel, the complete 4K VOD library, the EPG, and 24/7 support. No payment information is collected, and no card is placed on file. Credentials arrive within minutes of requesting the trial via WhatsApp at +44 7848 197761.

What the trial covers:
- 24,000+ live channels
- 120,000+ on-demand titles in HD/4K
- 2 simultaneous device connections
- Full EPG and channel categories
- The same servers and adaptive-bitrate technology as paid plans (no throttling)

What happens after the 24 hours:
- The trial credentials stop working. Nothing is charged.
- If you choose to continue, plans range from $16/month down to $7.50/month on the 12-month plan, with a 7-day money-back guarantee.

Trial URL: https://www.iptvupg.com/iptv-free-trial

## Best IPTV Service — How IPTV UPG Compares

The best IPTV service is defined by seven measurable criteria, not by price alone. These are the metrics IPTV UPG tracks against the broader market:

| Criterion | IPTV UPG | Mid-Tier Providers | Budget Providers |
|-----------|----------|---------------------|------------------|
| Verified live channels | 24,000+ | 8,000–15,000 | 2,000–5,000 (often inflated) |
| On-demand titles | 120,000+ | 30,000–60,000 | < 10,000 |
| True 4K / UHD | Full catalog | Partial | Rarely |
| Anti-freeze tech | Adaptive bitrate (HLS / DASH) | Basic HLS | Single bitrate |
| Verified uptime | 99.9% | 98–99% | Unmonitored |
| Full EPG | Yes (95%+ accuracy) | Yes (70–90%) | Spotty / missing |
| Device support | Smart TV, Fire TV, Apple TV, Roku, phone, PC, MAG, macOS | Most | Android only |
| Free trial | 24h, no credit card | 24-hour test | Rarely |
| Support response | < 5 min (WhatsApp 24/7) | 1–24 hours | Email only / none |
| Refund policy | 7-day money-back | 3-day | None |
| Price (annual) | $7.50/mo | $10–$15/mo | $3–$6/mo (risky) |

Reference: https://www.iptvupg.com/best-iptv-service

## Editorial Standards

Articles, setup guides, and subscription pages on iptvupg.com are written and maintained by the IPTV UPG editorial and engineering teams. Pricing figures, channel counts, uptime statistics, and device-compatibility claims are verified against production monitoring and customer-support records before publication. External references — IPTV protocols, codec specifications, broadcaster examples — are linked directly to primary sources (e.g., the Wikipedia "Internet Protocol Television" article). Pages are reviewed on a rolling schedule; the most recent review date appears in each article's schema metadata and visible byline. Corrections are accepted at support@iptvupg.com and applied within two business days.

## Legal & Compliance Posture

IPTV UPG is an independent streaming service provider. We do not host, store, or distribute any third-party copyrighted content. All trademarks, logos, and brand names referenced on this website remain the property of their respective owners. IPTV UPG is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any broadcaster or content provider. Users are responsible for ensuring that their use of the service complies with all applicable laws in their jurisdiction.

Legal documentation:
- Terms & Conditions: https://www.iptvupg.com/terms
- Privacy Policy: https://www.iptvupg.com/privacy
- Refund Policy: https://www.iptvupg.com/refund
- DMCA Policy: https://www.iptvupg.com/dmca

DMCA agent: dmca@iptvupg.com — copyright claims are processed within statutory timelines.
